greeting.npc_text: Alex! Come in, come in. Have a seat. I know this isn't easy, but we'll get through it.

choices.text: Thanks Bob. I just want to get the separation agreement and get this over with.
How are you, Bob? You look tired.
I need a moment. I'll be right back.

agreement_talk.npc_text: Right, the agreement. I have it all drawn up. But... I could really use a coffee first. The machine's right there but I've been swamped all day. Would you mind?

choices.text: Sure, I'll make you a coffee.
Can't you just give me the agreement now?

coffee_thanks.npc_text: You're a saint. The coffee machine is on the small table over there. I take mine black, no sugar.

choices.text: One black coffee, coming right up.

insist_coffee.npc_text: Look, I've been here since 6 AM reviewing your case. A little caffeine would really help me focus on making sure everything's in order. You want this done right, don't you?

choices.text: Fine, I'll get you a coffee.

tired_talk.npc_text: Ha, you can tell? I've been pulling long hours. Divorce season, you know — if there is such a thing. But enough about me. You're here about the agreement.

choices.text: Sorry to add to your workload.

no_worries.npc_text: Don't be. This is what I do, and honestly, your case is one of the more amicable ones. Let's get you sorted.

choices.text: I'm ready. What do I need to do?
